recommendations.title: Complete fire-system remediation evidence package
recommendations.evidence: Task and deficiency records share the canonical facility_id.
recommendations.action: Dispatch vendor, attach evidence, and retest affected devices.
recommendations.expectedBenefit: Reduced false alarms and verified closure posture.
